name: Pete & Shannon's Damn Good Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 pound hot breakfast sausage without skin
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meats and drain all fat.
2. Sauté onions and peppers in a large pot.
3. Add remaining ingredients: ground beef, sausage, salt, pepper, garlic powder, bouillon cubes, cumin, chili powder, barbecue sauce, tomato paste, tomato sauce, beer, water, and kidney beans.
4. Simmer the chili for at least 4 hours over low heat, stirring occasionally.
5. If desired, thicken the chili just before serving by mixing cornstarch with water.
6. Adjust color if necessary by adding a few drops of gravy master.
